name: 4) Tom Kha Gai
method: Boil 1 cup of coconut milk on low heat
Boil 1 cup of coconut milk on low heat
Add lemon juice, galangal (Step 2), and chicken into the boiling coconut milk and continue to simmer for 5-6 minutes.
Add lemon juice, galangal (Step 2), and chicken into the boiling coconut milk and continue to simmer for 5-6 minutes.
Add 1 more cup of coconut milk and let it heat on medium-low heat
Add 1 more cup of coconut milk and let it heat on medium-low heat
Add palm sugar, coriander stalks, Thai chilies, paprika, tomatoes, makrut and onions. Let it cook until the vegetables soften
Add palm sugar, coriander stalks, Thai chilies, paprika, tomatoes, makrut and onions. Let it cook until the vegetables soften
Add 1 cup of water, fish sauce, the rest of the ingredients
